metadata.description: SportsDataverse Claude Code plugins — engineering tooling for the SportsDataverse Python + R packages.

plugins.name: sdv-toolkit
plugins.description: Codegen-safe edit guards, multi-provider league/source scaffolding (ESPN/Fox/CBS/Yahoo/247/Torvik), returns-schema + docstring auditors, polars-1x / parser-contract / http-layer reviewers, and SDV-style R pkgdown/roxygen helpers.
